sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63505" key="lipobotane/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐπο-βοτᾰνέω</orth>, <sense id="n63505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lose</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">be without herbage</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.182e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
